hero.subtitle: ModularAI untangles your messy, fragmented data and turns it into clear, predictive insights. Get SAP-level smarts without needing a PhD to use it.

trustbar.quote: "Built for companies too big for Excel, but too smart to overpay for SAP."

beforeAfter.title: The Data Transformation
beforeAfter.subtitle: Experience the clarity of a modern spa day for your spreadsheets.

features.feat1_desc: Buy exactly what you need. No more hoarding stock like a squirrel, and no more "Out of Stock" apologies.
features.feat2_desc: Catch disappearing clients before they ghost you. Our warning system flags dropping sales instantly.
features.feat3_desc: Data-backed upsell recommendations that make your sales team look like mind readers.

cta.title: Ready for a data spa day?
cta.subtitle: Join 400+ smart companies who traded their magic 8-balls for predictive clarity.
cta.disclaimer: No credit card required. Connect your data in 3 minutes.

pricing.hero_subtitle: A modern spa day for your data infrastructure. Stop fighting with archaic tools and start enjoying predictive serenity.
pricing.faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know about finding your data sanctuary. No corporate fluff allowed.
pricing.faq_quote: "The interface feels like a deep breath for my brain."
pricing.faq_a1: About 3 minutes. Most of that time is spent choosing which coffee you want to drink while our AI does the heavy lifting.
pricing.faq_a2: We use bank-grade encryption—the good kind, not the kind that lets people buy yachts with your credit card.
pricing.faq_q3: Why is it so much cheaper than SAP?
pricing.faq_a3: No bloat. No consultants in gray suits. Just efficient code and a passion for predictive clarity.

resources.subtitle: Guides, insights, and witty takes on why your spreadsheets are lying to you. We do the heavy lifting so your brain doesn't have to.
resources.featured_title: Why the Magic 8-Ball isn't a valid inventory strategy.
resources.featured_desc: Signs point to 'No.' Stop leaving your stock levels to chance and start using predictive data that actually predicts things.
resources.card1_title: The Hidden Cost of 'Manual Entry' (It's your sanity).
resources.card1_desc: Copying and pasting is for middle school projects, not enterprise supply chains. Here's how to reclaim your weekend.
resources.card2_title: How to spot a 'Ghosting' client before they're gone.
resources.card2_desc: Churn signals are louder than you think. Learn the behavioral data patterns that scream "I'm leaving you for Steve."
resources.card3_title: SAP vs. ModularAI: The David & Goliath of Data.
resources.card3_desc: One is a giant ship that takes 2 years to turn. The other is a speedboat with a mini-fridge. Choose wisely.
resources.news_desc: Join our weekly data spa delivered to your inbox. No spam, no jargon, just the insights you actually need to win.
resources.news_disclaimer: By subscribing, you agree to our Privacy Policy. We promise to be gentle.
